intro.body: Entry points and status — where API data exists, only light summaries; otherwise links to tools. Details only on the target pages.

env.bannerTest: FinanzOnline environment: TEST — not production submissions.
env.bannerUnknown: FinanzOnline environment: not set — configure `NEXT_PUBLIC_RKSV_ENVIRONMENT` (TEST or PROD) for clear labelling.
env.hintTest: Use for training and diagnostics; do not rely on it alone for compliance decisions.
env.hintUnknown: Without explicit labelling, the environment may be confused with production API usage.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.critical: At least one status signal is critical — review Outbox and Incident first, then Replay and integrity.
nextSteps.warning: Warnings present — open the affected areas below and review metrics in detail.

sections.workByTaskHint: Same destinations as the sidebar. Below: status signals and tools.
sections.workflowHint: Narrow down first, then check the batch, then Outbox — diagnostics only if needed.

workflow.step1Hint: Correlation ID, audit trail and FinanzOnline in one view.
workflow.step2Hint: Batch by correlation ID; success, duplicate and failure.
workflow.step3Hint: Operational pipeline — primary vs payment-row legacy.

cardFootnote.payloadSample: Sample: max. {{maxRows}} rows — not a full inventory.
cardFootnote.coverageWindow: Fixed window: last 24 h UTC (this card only).
cardFootnote.finanzOnlineMetrics: Metrics refer to submissions — open Outbox for the SOAP pipeline.
cardFootnote.replayWindow: Summary (24 h): backlog, final failures and incident density — aggregate signal, not a per-case guarantee.
cardFootnote.exportRisk: This view uses integrity checks only as a first hint for export risk.

summary.unavailable: API error or no response — no signal (not the same as “no issues”).
summary.critical: Critical payload-hash risks in the sample — triage.
summary.warning: Hints in the sample — check the detail page and possibly a larger scope.
summary.zero: 0 rows in the sample — no assessment signal (not “all clear”).
summary.ok: No findings in this analysis — sample only (max rows), not a full inventory.

summary.unavailable: Coverage API failed — no signal (not the same as “no issues”).
summary.critical: Coverage alert per API — check details.
summary.zero: 0 records in the period — no coverage signal (not “all clear”).
summary.ok: Coverage in range per API (last 24 h UTC; see detail page for filters).

summary.unavailable: Metrics API failed — no signal (not the same as “no issues”).
summary.critical: Permanent FinanzOnline submission errors per metrics — review reconciliation.
summary.warning: Failed submissions per metrics — review reconciliation.
summary.ok: Per metrics API: no failed submissions (counters).

summary.unavailable: Replay summary unavailable — no reliable statement.
summary.critical: Elevated replay risk (backlog or final-failure checks).
summary.ok: Replay looks unremarkable in the {{hours}} h window.

summary.unavailable: Export/integrity overview unavailable — no reliable statement.
summary.critical: Export/integrity risks present — check integrity page.
summary.ok: No export/integrity risks in this overview check.

healthLevel.unavailableTooltip: API call failed or no response — status cannot be assessed.

notes.title: Notes on the cards
notes.bullet1: OK: no finding in this API response for the stated scope — not automatically a full data inventory.
notes.bullet2: Warning / Critical: interpret traffic-light colour together with short text and the detail page.
notes.bullet3: Unavailable: call failed — do not read as “all good”.
notes.bullet4: Payload: POST analysis, limited rows. Coverage: GET summary, 24 h UTC. FinanzOnline: GET metrics.
notes.bullet5: Replay/Export: dashboard uses api/admin/operations/summary (24 h) as a connecting signal.

daily.title: Operational
daily.description: Day-to-day: register overview, Outbox/SOAP pipeline (primary) and optional payment-row legacy.

investigation.title: Incidents
investigation.description: Narrow down issues: Incident, Replay, hash conflicts and audit trail (signature/offline).

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Support and integrity: export risk, DB-wide checks and offline coverage.

config.title: Connectivity
config.description: Interfaces and configuration: status, certificate and integration surface (not the reconciliation list).

fiscalExportPage.title: Fiscal export
fiscalExportPage.profileHelp: The profile sets purpose and required permissions. Every payload still carries the «not statutory RKSV proof» notice — including compliance packs.
fiscalExportPage.diagnosticDesc: Engineering analysis and support: integrity flags are slice-scoped and best-effort.
fiscalExportPage.auditHandoffDesc: Structured bundle for internal or external auditors — alongside the audit log; not a substitute for official registers or FinanzOnline.
fiscalExportPage.complianceDesc: Pack for external compliance or legal review (requires fiscal.export.compliance); not a FinanzOnline substitute.
fiscalExportPage.profileForbidden: You do not have permission for this profile.
fiscalExportPage.selectRegisterAndUtcError: Please select a register and UTC period.
fiscalExportPage.emptyHintCardBody: Choose export profile, register, and UTC period; run “JSON preview” or “Download JSON”.
fiscalExportPage.statutoryDisclaimerBody: Statutory disclaimer: not an RKSV attestation — applies to all profiles.
fiscalExportPage.globalIntegrityHint: Use «Data integrity» for database-wide checks; export cards only show slice-level risk.

incident.introLead: Correlation-centred aggregation (replay batch + audit + FinanzOnline reconciliation join). This page is context and evidence — row-/payment-level FO truth remains with the
incident.searchTip: Tip: accepts correlation as UUID, URL, or RKSV handoff JSON (prefix {{prefix}}…).
incident.foTruthNoticeBefore: FO fields in the payment table are joined from the reconciliation list
incident.foTruthNoticeAfter: (derived). For full FO rows, error text, and retry semantics, open reconciliation.
incident.advisoryLockTimeoutTitle: Advisory lock timeout detected in batch audit
incident.payloadImmutableMismatchTitle: Payload immutable mismatch in batch audit
incident.registerFkNotUuidHint: FO field is not UUID-shaped — do not use for register deep links.
incident.timelineIntro: Replay started → dedup/recompute/structural → synced/failed → FO submit/retry (if present).
incident.auditStructureIntro: Sorted by time — replay path and payload repair extracted from request/response where present.

replayBatchSearch.intro: Enter a replay-batch correlation ID (e.g. from logs or replay response) to open batch details, success/fail/duplicate, and log trace links.

cmcCertificate.scopeBannerP1: This page only shows technical status for TSE/CMC/certificate and detected devices. It is not FinanzOnline truth per payment and not legal proof for individual receipts.
cmcCertificate.scopeBannerP2Before: For operational FinanzOnline status per payment (error text, retry, reference) use the
cmcCertificate.plannedValidityDesc: The current API does not expose valid-from/to or timeline fields.
cmcCertificate.plannedChainDesc: The current API does not expose chain/issuer/subject hierarchy data.

integrityPage.title: Data integrity (support)
integrityPage.alertIntro: Only consistency checks in the selected period (receipt numbers/sequences, refunds, payments without invoice linkage). For chain diagnostics see
integrityPage.noIssuesTitle: No hits in the main categories (selected period)
integrityPage.pwiHint: Blocks daily closing for the affected register among other things — open details in

finanzOnlineOpsPage.enterInvoiceIdHint: Enter an invoice ID to load history.
finanzOnlineOpsPage.historyEmpty: No submission history for this invoice ID.

replayBatchDetail.introLead: Technical replay context for a batch correlation (observability + payment/receipt links). This page is
replayBatchDetail.introTrail: the final FinanzOnline truth per payment — use the
replayBatchDetail.successReplayFootnote: Note: success here refers to replay/batch processing, not FinanzOnline.
replayBatchDetail.failedCheckMore: Continue: open affected payments in FinanzOnline reconciliation.
replayBatchDetail.failedCheckFoAnyway: No replay failure/duplicate reported; still check FO status in reconciliation.
replayBatchDetail.foHintBannerBodyBefore: This table has no FO status fields. Check FO per payment via

payloadHashConflictsPage.title: Payload-hash conflicts
payloadHashConflictsPage.intro: Mixed surface: investigation (analysis, tables, export) and a separate repair tab. Parameters (max rows, register) apply to both.
payloadHashConflictsPage.noRepairableInScope: No repairable items in this scope.
payloadHashConflictsPage.investigationReadOnlyBody: Analysis and CSV export do not change data. Repair (dry-run / apply) is in the Repair tab.
payloadHashConflictsPage.runAnalysisHint: Run an analysis with the parameters above.
payloadHashConflictsPage.repairDangerBody: Dry-run and repair use the same endpoints as before. Apply writes to the database — analyze in Investigation first.
payloadHashConflictsPage.repairLockedBody: Dry-run and repair require the system.critical permission.
payloadHashConflictsPage.modalApplyContent: This writes payload_hash values to the database. Review dry-run first. Continue?
